name: Warehouse Expansion Inventory Update
description: The Green Valley Water Facility is updating its Tier II inventory due to a site expansion. You must update the existing report. 1. Open C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s in Tier2 Submit. 2. Delete the chemical 'Fluorosilic Acid' (CAS: 16961-83-4) completely as it was removed from the site. 3. Update 'Chlorine' (CAS: 7782-50-5): Change the Maximum Daily Amount range code to 06 (25,000 - 49,999 lbs). Do not change the Average amount. Keep the existing storage location, but ADD a second storage location for Chlorine with these details: Container Type: Box, Pressure: Ambient pressure, Temperature: Ambient temperature, Location Description: 'Exterior Cage B, South Yard'. 4. Go to Facility Attachments and attach C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\updated_site_map.pdf as a 'Site Plan'. 5. Save the updated file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\warehouse_expansion_updated.t2s.
